workspaceDescription: Type in either panel. Valid Base64 values decode back into text immediately.
plainTextDescription: Paste or type any UTF-8 text, including emoji and non-Latin characters.
encodedTextDescription: Paste or edit Base64 here to decode it back into readable text.
invalidBase64Title: The Base64 value is not valid yet.
invalidBase64Description: Check for missing padding, unexpected characters, or partially pasted data.
